sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 2026년 1분기 매출 114억 8,900만 달러 달성, 주요 제품의 제네릭 경쟁 심화에도 불구하고 파이프라인 성과 지속

keyPoints.text: Revlimid 매출은 미국 내 제네릭 침식으로 인해 63% 감소하며 실적에 하방 압력을 가함
Pomalyst/Imnovid 및 Sprycel 또한 제네릭 경쟁에 따른 수요 감소로 각각 22%, 58% 매출 하락을 기록함
Mezigdomide, Camzyos, Reblozyl 등 주요 파이프라인에서 긍정적인 임상 결과를 확보하며 미래 성장 동력을 강화함

riskChanges.text: 미국 및 해외 시장에서의 가격 압박과 규제 강화가 지속되어 매출과 이익률에 부정적인 영향을 미치고 있음
공급망의 지연 및 중단 가능성과 더불어 세법 변경이 향후 수익성에 잠재적 위험 요소로 작용할 수 있음

financialHighlights.text: 총자산은 864억 7,600만 달러이며, 현금 및 현금성 자산은 95억 7,400만 달러를 보유함

watchItems.text: 주력 제품인 Revlimid의 매출 급감은 제네릭 침식의 현실화를 의미하며, 이를 상쇄할 신약 파이프라인의 상업적 성공 속도가 향후 수익성 회복의 핵심임

evidence.sourceTextDigest: Quarter ended 2026-03-31 revenue = 114억 8,900만 달러 (USD 11.489B; 11,489 million), XBRL range 2026-01-01..2026-03-31.
Quarter ended 2026-03-31 net income = 26억 7,700만 달러 (USD 2.677B; 2,677 million), XBRL range 2026-01-01..2026-03-31.
Quarter ended 2026-03-31 total assets = 864억 7,600만 달러 (USD 86.476B; 86,476 million), XBRL range instant..2026-03-31.
Quarter ended 2026-03-31 cash and cash equivalents = 95억 7,400만 달러 (USD 9.574B; 9,574 million), XBRL range instant..2026-03-31.

Intellectual Property" for further information. 31 • Revlimid revenues decreased 63% during the first quarter of 2026, primarily due to lower demand in the U.S. as a result of generic erosion. In the U.S., certain third parties have been granted volume-limited licenses to sell generic lenalidomide. Pursuant to these licenses, several generics have entered or are expected to enter the U.S. market with volume-limited quantities of generic lenalidomide. As of January 31, 2026, these licenses are no longer volume-limited. In the EU and Japan, generic lenalidomide products have entered the market. • Pomalyst/Imnovid revenues decreased 22% during the first quarter of 2026, primarily due to lower demand as a result of generic erosion. In the U.S. (March 2026) and EU, generics have entered the market. • Sprycel revenues decreased 58% during the first quarter of 2026, primarily due to lower deman

Results of Operations—Executive Summary—Strategy" in our 2025 Form 10-K. Refer to the Summary of Abbreviated Terms at the end of this Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q for terms used throughout the document. During the first quarter of 2026, we made meaningful progress advancing our pipeline, highlighted by: (i) positive interim Phase III results from the SUCCESSOR‑2 study of oral mezigdomide in RRMM, (ii) positive Phase III results from the SCOUT-HCM trial of Camzyos in adolescents with symptomatic oHCM, (iii) positive top‑line results from a Phase II trial for Reblozyl in adults with Alpha (α)-Thalassemia, (iv) positive interim top‑line results from a Phase III trial conducted in China for iza-bren in previously treated unresectable locally advanced or metastatic TNBC, and (v) FDA acceptance of our NDA for iberdomide in combination with standard therapy for patients with RRMM.
